Story.Name: Mod_trib_story_gong2
Story.Desc: [NAME] came to [PLACE] and discovered something extraordinary. The ruins of an ancient sovereign's cultivation chamber lie buried beneath the earth — a cultivator of unparalleled power who once ruled over an entire world of sects. The aura is overwhelming, pressing down like a mountain, yet there is also a strange invitation within it, as if the ancient sovereign is waiting for a worthy successor.

li.Display: Endure the sovereign pressure and enter the ruins
Harmonize the spirit with the sovereign's will
Leave — the power here is too dangerous
li.OKResult: me:AddMsg(XT("After careful consideration, [NAME] decided not to challenge the sovereign's aura and left the ruins undisturbed."));
